import React from 'react'; const features = [ { icon: '🌊', text: 'Private Beachfront' }, { icon: '🍽️', text: 'Fine Dining' }, { icon: '🧖', text: 'Luxury Spa' }, { icon: '🏊', text: 'Infinity Pool' }, { icon: '🤿', text: 'Diving & Snorkeling' }, { icon: '🌿', text: 'Eco Friendly' }, ]; function About() { return (

About the Resort

A Sanctuary of Timeless Elegance

Perched along the pristine shores of the Maldives, Sunset Resort has welcomed discerning travelers since 2008. Our philosophy is simple — every guest deserves an experience that goes beyond the ordinary.

From overwater bungalows with glass floors revealing coral reefs, to lush garden villas surrounded by tropical blooms — every corner is designed to create memories you'll treasure forever.

{features.map((f) => (
{f.icon} {f.text}
))}
); } export default About;
